verdict: ✅ ALL 96 TESTS PASSED — no failures or regressions.
testReportSummary: The HealthCheckService implementation is solid. All 96 coder-written unit tests pass, covering empty-list handling, response/failure recording, staleness detection (including the 60-second default), concurrent state safety, worker removal, and aggregation math. Seven new integration tests verify the full worker lifecycle, mixed healthy/stale states in a single report, high-concurrency add+remove+read consistency, the exact stale-threshold boundary (strictly greater-than), default TimeProvider.System instantiation, and report timestamp advancement with a fake clock. Build is clean with zero warnings, coverage is 73.6%, and the application starts and exits correctly.
